MINI MINUTES: 11:52am

Judge Pro Tem Rick Wise, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Nancy Evans appears in pro per with Robert Evans. Respondent, Angela S. Vista Juanillo appears in pro per with John Juanillo.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and answer questions from Judge Wise.
